title: [YTP] Left 4 Rehab
description:
Round 1 vs. CripChillinz

God fuckin' dammit, my tech goes haywire with this one. Lots of half-second blackouts and messed up video.

Sources: Left 4 Speed by OneyNG, Left 4 Dead (owned by Valve, the first song is "One Winged Angel" from Final Fantasy 7. The song at the end is "The Monsters Within", from the Left 4 Dead game. Everything used in this video including clips and audio is not mine and belongs to their respective owners. Can't be too careful.
